summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of DJ voting site. All core features working correctly including hero section, vote modal, events, footer, and blog sections.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with logo and background image
Vote button opens modal with force=True click
Vote form fills correctly with all required fields
DJ ranking section displays 5 DJ cards properly
Events section shows 3 events with WhatsApp buttons
Footer displays CNPJ (21.534.683/0001-37) and Instagram link
Blog section displays 5 articles with proper layout
Navigation buttons work correctly (Vote CTA, Events CTA)
No error messages found on page load
All data-testid attributes present for testing
